title: Palladium RPG race / R.C.C.
description: Playable race or Race Character Class (R.C.C.) definition: identity, O.C.C. relationship, attribute dice, strength scale, polymorphic vitals, psionics, class constraints, innate skills, and composable innate bonuses (modifiers, activation, metadata). Non-sentient animals and monsters use raceComposition creature in creatures.json.

$schema.description: Relative or absolute pointer to this schema file for editor validation.

name.description: Display name as printed in the book.

description.description: Player-facing summary of the race or R.C.C.

raceAudience.description: Catalog pool and creation eligibility. **player** — character creation when whitelisted. **npc** — sentient NPC / minion stat blocks (not in player creation). **gm_approval** — playable only after GM approval. **creature** — `creatures.json` bestiary animals/monsters with no O.C.C. or skill program.

raceComposition.description: How the row is built at spawn. **character** — may pick an O.C.C. (default for Humans). **rcc** — self-contained R.C.C. with forcedOccId shadow O.C.C. **creature** — non-sentient stat block; no O.C.C., no related/secondary skills.

gameSystems.description: Game lines or settings this race appears in (stable slugs).

genresAvailable.description: Optional genre gate for campaign filtering (e.g. nightbane). When omitted, derived from gameSystems.

sources.description: Book references keyed by gameSystem slug (same vocabulary as gameSystems).

canPickOcc.description: When true, the character may select a separate O.C.C. after choosing this race (e.g. Humans). When false, the race is a self-contained R.C.C. with no secondary O.C.C. step (e.g. Guardians).

forcedOccId.description: When canPickOcc is false, this id points to the O.C.C. JSON row that holds the R.C.C. skill program (the Shadow O.C.C.). The engine auto-mounts that O.C.C. at creation and skips manual O.C.C. selection.

lineage.description: Optional engine hint for dual-form Nightbane UX and setting integrity. Prefer deriving from id when omitted.

creationSubForgeId.description: When set, master character creation Tab 6 hosts this sub-forge manifest (e.g. morphus_forge_manifest).

defaultTraitIds.description: Optional morphus / racial trait feature ids granted at creation.

attributes.description: Base dice notation for all eight Palladium attributes at character creation.

strengthCategory.description: Physical power scale for P.S. damage, carry, and M.D.C. interactions (combat_logic.md).

vitals.description: Hit Points, S.D.C., and starting P.P.E. formulas.

psionics.description: Racial psionic capability and optional innate I.S.P. pool formula.

occLimitations.description: Forbidden O.C.C. categories and explicit allow/deny lists by O.C.C. id.

innateSkills.description: Skills granted by biology or R.C.C. package (not purchased with O.C.C. slots).

innateBonuses.description: Composable passive bonuses using modifiers / activation / metadata (mirrors Feature composition).

classAbilities.description: Racial or R.C.C. abilities not modeled as skill catalog rows.

demographics.description: Average height, weight, lifespan, and alignment tendencies or exclusions.

sources.description: Book references keyed by gameSystem slug. Use one entry per book when page numbers differ. Put only the book title (plus edition if useful) in reference, and the printed start page in pageNumber.

gameSystem.description: Slug identifying the game line (must align with gameSystems, e.g. nightbane, rifts).

reference.description: Book title only (edition if relevant)—no page numbers in this string.

pageNumber.description: Printed page where this race or R.C.C. entry begins for that book.

diceNotationString.description: Dice expression: optional count, D, die size, optional * multiplier or +flat modifier (e.g. 3D6, 1D4*10, 2D6+8).

attributeFormulaString.description: Attribute roll at creation (typically NdX, e.g. 3D6).

hpFormulaString.description: Hit Point maximum formula using PE anchor (e.g. PE + 1D6).

ispAttributeFormulaString.description: Innate I.S.P. using a two-letter attribute anchor plus dice (e.g. ME + 2D6).

oneOf.description: Fixed starting P.P.E. when the book gives a constant.

strategy.description: Pick S.D.C. formula by matching O.C.C. background tags.

defaultFormula.description: Fallback S.D.C. dice when no override tag matches.

tags.description: O.C.C. tags; any match selects this formula.

oneOf.description: Fixed starting S.D.C. when the book gives a constant (e.g. Nightbane Facade).

sdc.description: Structural S.D.C. — flat dice string or conditional-by-O.C.C.-tags object.

averageStandardPpe.description: Starting racial P.P.E. reserve (dice or fixed). Legacy alias: basePpe.

basePpe.description: Deprecated — use averageStandardPpe. Retained for migrated library rows.

stackPpeWithOcc.description: When true, racial P.P.E. dice stack with the selected O.C.C. ppeEngine base. Default false: O.C.C. P.P.E. replaces race dice unless the race description explicitly requires stacking.

capabilityType.description: standard = may use Psychic Gate / O.C.C. psionics; none = no psionic development; innate = racial psychic pool without gate.

naturalIspFormula.description: Innate I.S.P. when capabilityType is innate; optional for standard/none (often 0).

forbiddenCategories.description: O.C.C. category labels barred for this race (e.g. Magic for Dwarves).

forbiddenOccIds.description: Explicit O.C.C. ids this race may not take.

allowedOccIds.description: When non-empty, only these O.C.C. ids are permitted (whitelist).

skillId.description: Catalog skill id granted at creation.

basePercent.description: Fixed starting % when the book gives a flat racial baseline.

bonusPercent.description: Additive % adjustment on top of normal O.C.C. / related skill resolution.

raceCombatModifiers.description: Combat maneuvers, attributes, and saving throws — mirrors skill physicalSkillBonuses keys plus save_* keys.

modifiers.description: Passive numeric bonuses merged into sheet combat and saving throws.

activation.description: Optional activated racial ability costs (P.P.E., I.S.P., actions).

metadata.description: Non-mechanical tags for UI, GM notes, or engine hints.

averageHeight.description: Typical height (narrative string or structured range in inches).

averageWeight.description: Typical weight in lbs (string or range).

excludedAlignments.description: Alignments structurally barred for this race.
